text:
これまでいつも良心的な報酬で
食材を調達してくれたおかげで
少し厨房の予算に余裕ができたの。

も、もちろん少しだけよ！
ほんの少しだけね。

だから今回は日頃のお礼のつもりで
肉じゃなくて野菜をお願いするのよ。

あ、でも「干からびた野草」って
火山洞窟にしか自生してないんだっけ？

となると逆にいつもより大変なお願いに
なっちゃうのかしら。でも大丈夫よね？
<%me>さ

Your willingness to go grab us ingredients for
a fair reward has actually given us a little
financial breathing room in the kitchen.
I-I mean, emphasis on "a little!" Really!

Anyway, I thought I'd give you a nice, light
task today with some veggie gathering as
thanks for all your hard work.

Although, come to think of it, dried wildgrass
only grows in the Volcanic Caves.

Which means this might actually end up
being MORE of a hassle, not less. But hey,
you're up to the challenge, right,
<%me>?
